title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 368.020 - Corporations, how organized
text:
368.020.  Corporations, how organized. — Corporations may be organized in the same manner as general and business corporations, under chapter 351, except as otherwise herein provided.
(RSMo 1939 § 5419, A.L. 1957 p. 212) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4980; 1919 § 10190
